answer_lines: Best CLI-ranked option: 85 022 RUB risk=excellent/0 elapsed=43h50.
Do not treat cached or segment-search absence as proof that a through fare, direct flight, or protected ticket does not exist.
Priority control: provider_aggregate_candidate rank=None 35 516 RUB elapsed=9h40.
Moscow gateway control: rank=1 85 022 RUB elapsed=43h50; compare against direct/best, do not hide solely because another option ranks higher.
Provider aggregate candidate: ticketing_protection=unknown; verify single-PNR/protection, baggage, fare rules, and final fare on the booking screen.
Coverage diagnostics: mode=targeted; searched=2, skipped=9, failed=0, not_executed=8; negative evidence is bounded live controls only.
Coverage is incomplete: planned controls without terminal live evidence are not_executed, not no-flight evidence.
Connection trade-off: long wait 17h40 at IST; overnight wait 17h40 at IST; visible trade-off, not automatic demotion.
Cheapest acceptable: rank=724 80 939 RUB risk=excellent/0 elapsed=96h10; show as trade-off, not hidden by compact output.
Fastest acceptable: rank=1033 93 292 RUB risk=excellent/3 elapsed=42h30; show as trade-off, not hidden by compact output.
Aggregate control found: 35 516 RUB SVX->FRA 3F478 + A3899 + A3830.

source_boundaries: Segment assembly prices direct one-way legs and does not construct GDS, airline through-fares, or guaranteed single-PNR fares.
Kupibilet aggregate controls can reveal provider-assembled route offers, but ticket protection, baggage, fare rules, and final price still require booking-screen verification.
Travelpayouts/Aviasales cached absence is not negative evidence.
Provider failures such as unavailable FLI MCP are source availability failures, not route absence evidence.

direct_route_intelligence.negative_filter: Only exact SVX direct-control probes are skipped when the airport is absent from the official seasonal schedule.

live_search.note: Kupibilet is used for Russia-touching segments; FLI MCP is used for non-Russia segments under auto policy. Recheck price/seat availability before purchase.

destination.note: destination resolved to a single flightable airport.

origin.note: origin resolved to a single flightable airport.

route_families.condition: check direct exact-airport legs when live assembly runs; cache empty results
check first; use origin->IST direct when available
run as Moscow/SVO control even when origin->IST direct has offers
check only if direct/SVO/IST priority routes do not produce a usable assembled pair; do not expand origin->DXB through Moscow

warnings: Kupibilet live segment assembly uses direct-only one-way searches; availability and price still require final booking-screen recheck.
Assembled candidates are usually separate-ticket/self-transfer unless the booking site later confirms protected through-ticketing.
Using ru-priority routing: direct control, IST direct first, SVO/Moscow gateway control even when direct exists, DXB only if priority routes are not usable.

skipped_because.note: Official SVX seasonal schedule has no direct route for this exact airport pair; hub routing is still checked.
DXB skipped because direct/SVO/IST priority routing already produced a non-error journey.
